chunks.text: My sister always chooses her words.
She pauses quietly first, and then she speaks.
Whenever she speaks, I acknowledge something deeply true in her voice.
Being honest with your own emotion is the most important thing.
" Her advice is always gentle, but it moves my heart.
When she listens, she expresses patience.
When I share an opinion, she takes time to consider it.
Her opinion is always sincere and genuine.
I hope I will one day have the calm mature nature she has.
She encourages me, and she truly does concern herself with my future.
" A person can care for others only after they realize themselves.
" Her distant but steady words stayed with me.
